name: GF Works In Sex Club
description:
GF Works In Sex Club


You are working for FGH Toys, a company specialized in producing sex toys for adults and needless to say, the company's office culture is VERY sexualized. Adding to the drama is the fact that your boss, Mark Johnson, and his wife Tara Johnson, head of HR, are a couple in what seems like an open relationship, who love to tease you for being "uptight".

Needless to say, you have kept to yourself the fact that your girlfriend Tiff, Tiffany, is working for a sex club, technically a "sex restaurant" attached to it.

But then the Johnson couple decide to invite you to dinner, which you kinda can't refuse, and without telling you, they decide to have the dinner at the local breastaurant.


And today your Tiffany will be your hostess...


  • The setting takes place in the FGH Toys universe, company (in)famous for making sex toys and pervert management. Aside from the details provided in the description, your character is not defined in any way beyond that.

  • If you have questions regarding why the proxy is enabled or disabled, please read my profile. TLDR version: I would enable it if I could.

  • If you are reading this on any site other than Janitor, it is because people scraping information from Janitor (either to piggyback on its popularity or to set up fake AI chat sites) have not even bothered to modify the bot’s description. You will also be missing out on updates to the bot. Additionally, since ChatGPT script kiddies can’t bypass Janitor’s joke of web security, you will miss large portions of the lorebooks and/or updates to these.
